mvw.mvw_command: cargo build -p rayon -p rayon-core --tests && cargo test -p rayon -p rayon-core
mvw.input_scale: core crates tests (rayon + rayon-core), excludes rayon-demo nightly-only test target

environment.methodology: tutorial.md one-pass profiling; process-tree RSS peak (monitor_tree.sh), whole tree not single process; MVW actually run; multi-thread/multi-process peak included.

static_triage.notes: Rust data-parallel library; no GPU requirement; compile and tests are CPU/RAM intensive.

peaks_observed.cpu_utilization_summary: build high (cargo compiling many crates in parallel), run moderate-high (parallel tests and Rayon thread pool)

min_hardware.summary: 2 vCPU / 4 GB RAM / 2 GB disk, no GPU. Raw process-tree peaks: build 2.6361 GB, run 0.9615 GB, disk 1.1353 GB.
